text.title: Survey Design Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Willingness-to-pay survey for AI subject-line tool
example.note: Hypothesis: 'Solo creators will pay $19/mo for an AI subject-line tool'. Drafted 11 questions (8 closed + 3 open-text); ordered ease -> price -> demographics. Bias-lint flagged Q5 ('Don't you agree subject lines are hard?') -> rewritten to 'How would you describe writing subject lines?'. Pilot N=10: 3 reported Q7 ambiguous -> rewrote. Sample plan: solo_creators_under_1k segment, target N=150 (90% CI +/-8%). Launched; closed at N=164 after 8 days.
